title: Slow Slovakian Cheese Lasagna
description: A savory and cozy Slovakian dish featuring chilled butter and bonito flakes, perfect for a cold winter evening. This ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly recipe is sure to become a family favorite.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the lasagna noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, melt the chilled butter over medium heat and add the bonito flakes, cooking for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
In a large bowl, combine the ricotta cheese, mozzarella cheese, parmesan cheese, eggs, salt, and black pepper, mixing well to combine.
Spread a layer of the cheese mixture in the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish, followed by a layer of lasagna noodles.
Repeat the layers, starting with the cheese mixture, then the noodles, until all of the ingredients have been used, finishing with a layer of cheese on top.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
